chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. S- 155 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 12.02.2016 1. For Orders on MA 2094/16 2. For Orders on Office Objection 3. For Orders on MA 1639/16 4. For Katcha Peshi 5. For Hearing of MA 1640/16 Mr. Faisal Nadeem Abro, Advocate for petitioner Ch. Bashir Ahmed Asstt. A.G. Mr. Shahid Shaikh, A.P.G. Petitioner is alleging harassment against official respondents at the behest of private respondents. Admittedly the writ against private persons does not lie and against them the petitioner may move a proper forum. On behalf of official respondents, learned A.A.G. as well as learned A.P.G. undertake that no harassment would be caused to the petitioner and the official respondents would provide due protection under the law to the petitioner. The statement of learned APG and A.A.G. has served the purpose of this petition which is disposed of in the above terms along with pending applications. Let copy of this order be faxed to SSP concerned for compliance. JUDGE *Karar/-
